title: elaeocarpus ledermannii
intro: Elaeocarpus ledermannii, also known as the Papua white cherry or Ledermann's tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus ledermannii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit potential anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
